problems.display: Write an expression: the difference between 6 and x, squared

problems.display: Write an expression: 3 times the quantity 5 minus p

problems.display: Find the value of (35/z) · 13 when z = 5

problems.label: 4a
problems.group: 4. Write an expression for each situation.
problems.display: Write an expression: Three friends split a scuba outfit costing p dollars equally. Each pays?

problems.label: 4b
problems.display: Write an expression: Modelling clay for $3 and six boxes of crayons for c dollars each. Total cost?
